items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Hobo bag shoulder bag is here✔️
Typical ultra-cool minimalist style, minimalist lovers, come get it.
Minimalist cold style curved shape, overall design simple, lazy yet intellectual. Looks elegant and atmospheric when worn, very light weight. Cowhide texture is super fine! The unique curved design really hits the spot ؔʁ̷ l̲̮ ؔʁ̷✧
Simple and versatile shape, a must-have for K-pop and Japanese fashion influencers.
Go all the way with minimalism, adding a bit of playfulness to the cool style~
Model: 672615
Size: 24.5×18×7cm

items.name_en: 💞💞Saint Laurent classic legendary fashion meets romance❓YSL's original leather texture has this property. Can't describe how charming it is, it has a magic that attracts you. It is a basic essential in many women's wardrobes, allowing you to create a simple yet textured look, full of accents💋Size: 24 Model 26821-1
